Use.title: Diagrams · sequences.
Use.subtitle: Pipelines, milestone strips, vertical timelines.
Use.inside1: Horizontal pipeline · five phase tiles + arrows
Use.inside2: Vertical timeline · numbered milestones with notes
Use.inside3: Composed from VStack · HStack · Layer · Shape · Line
Use.inside4: No bespoke diagram nodes — every sample is primitives only
Use.epigraph: A sequence is a story you can read with one finger. Show one phase per glance.
Use.meta: Composed from VStack · HStack · Layer · Shape · Line
Use.leftMeta: 3 sample diagrams · primitives only · no composite nodes

Use.title: Horizontal pipeline — five sequential phases
Use.lede: Five stages with arrowed connectors. Each tile uses VStack on a tinted surface; the connectors live on a Layer that overlays the row.
